identity: Human male tactician, late 30s, medium dark brown hair pushed back from the forehead, brown eyes, stern lined face, clean-shaven.
outfit: Dark brown leather coat over a black tunic, bronze military emblem (a stylized eagle) on the left breast, leather gloves.
weapons: A long steel officer's sword held upright in the right hand. A folded tan parchment battle map held in the left hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Sword thrust forward in the right hand as a command signal, left hand pointing with the rolled map toward an unseen enemy.
spellStyle: East-facing. Map held open in both hands in front of him, sword sheathed at hip, faint golden glyphs rising from the parchment.
blockStyle: East-facing. Sword held vertically in front of the body, map tucked under the left arm, stance grounded.
koStyle: East-facing, on one knee, sword planted in the ground, map fallen at his feet, head bowed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), commanding idle. Sword held upright in the right hand, folded map in the left, bronze eagle emblem on the chest.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Dark brown leather coat, bronze eagle emblem on the chest, stern lined face, brown hair, folded tan parchment map in the left hand, steel sword held upright in the right hand.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male tactician, late 30s, medium dark brown hair pushed back from the forehead, brown eyes, stern lined face, clean-shaven.

OUTFIT: Dark brown leather coat over a black tunic, bronze military emblem (a stylized eagle) on the left breast, leather gloves.

WEAPONS: A long steel officer's sword held upright in the right hand. A folded tan parchment battle map held in the left hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male tactician, late 30s, medium dark brown hair pushed back from the forehead, brown eyes, stern lined face, clean-shaven.

OUTFIT: Dark brown leather coat over a black tunic, bronze military emblem (a stylized eagle) on the left breast, leather gloves.

WEAPONS: A long steel officer's sword held upright in the right hand. A folded tan parchment battle map held in the left hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Dark brown leather coat, bronze eagle emblem on the chest, stern lined face, brown hair, folded tan parchment map in the left hand, steel sword held upright in the right hand.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
